AUCTION RESULTS

SUBSCRIBE

Auction Recap

28 MAY 2026

We are delighted to update you on our activity for the week.

26 properties were up for sale, with 14 selling under the hammer!

Be sure to check out our results and if you are thinking of selling, please do get in touch.
